task.title: Expose cloud workflow scheduling through Relay SDK

events.content: Expose workflow schedule helpers from @agent-relay/sdk/workflows: Expose workflow schedule helpers from @agent-relay/sdk/workflows

raw.question: Expose workflow schedule helpers from @agent-relay/sdk/workflows
raw.reasoning: Ricky and similar products should consume scheduling from Relay SDK instead of duplicating Cloud endpoint calls. The SDK re-exports the existing @agent-relay/cloud scheduling implementation.

retrospective.summary: Re-exported Cloud workflow schedule helpers from @agent-relay/sdk/workflows and verified SDK build plus cloud CLI schedule tests.
